summary: Support Portal for ticket management, increased list view capacity, and a clearer duplicate user error experience.

updates.title: Support Portal
updates.body: Users can now submit, track, and manage support tickets directly within Ascend 2.0.

updates.title: Increased List View Row Limit
updates.body: Rows per page in list views have been increased from 200 to 500, reducing the need to paginate through large data sets.

updates.title: Duplicate User Error Message
updates.body: Attempting to invite a user who already exists now shows a clear, specific error message instead of a generic failure notice.
